_doc_limitation_: CUSTOMCURRENT VERB NOT YET SUPPORTED BY JSON LOADER: incorporator/observability/tideweaver/config.py::_build_current dispatches on verb in {'stream', 'fjord', 'export'}; 'custom' raises ValueError, and its `class` reference must resolve to an Incorporator subclass (not a CustomCurrent subclass). The hitting/pitching nodes below will not load via the CLI today. Use the Python entry (mlb_pulse.py) for a full run. Adding `verb: 'custom'` support to the JSON loader is a separate framework follow-up.
